title: stellaria media var. glabella
intro: Stellaria media var. glabella, also known as lesser chickweed, is a flowering plant belonging to the carnation family. It has been used in herbal medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, making it useful in treating various health issues, such as skin conditions, wounds, and digestive problems. The health benefits of lesser chickweed include its ability to reduce inflammation, promote wound healing, and soothe digestive issues, making it a popular natural remedy. Lesser chickweed can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and salves, which are often used topically or taken internally to harness its medicinal properties.
